text: Bitcoin Solo Miner Wins $210K Block Reward. A small solo Bitcoin miner successfully mined block 943411 on Thursday, earning the full block reward of approximately $210,000. The total reward amounted to 3.139 BTC, consisting of a 3.125 BTC block subsidy and 0.014 BTC in transaction fees, valued at around $937. The miner operated through solo.ckpool.org, a solo mining pool that allows participants to retain full rewards while charging a 2% fee. The pool confirmed the achievement, identifying the miner by wallet address and noting the setup's approximate hashrate of 230 terahashes per second (TH/s).
label: positive
